provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Economics and Finance Major and School Requirements
note: This supplement is cohort-specific to students admitted in 2025-26. It records the seven unique codes explicitly named by the ECOF Major Requirements, the School of Business and Management courses applicable to BSc ECOF, and annual catalog snapshots for the two open elective rules. The Major requires any 3 ECON 4000-level courses for at least 11 credits and any 2 FINA 3000-level-or-above courses for at least 6 credits. The catalog rows make those open numbered pools browsable but are not permanent closed graduation pools; eligibility remains subject to prerequisites, exclusions, approvals, offering and the no-reuse rules. FINA 3103 is stored once as Major Required even though its number also falls within the FINA open-pool range, without claiming duplicate credit. ECON 4959, ECON 4999, FINA 4919 and FINA 4929 retain their official variable-credit ranges while using local credits 0 to avoid assuming an endpoint. Recommended Year and semester values come only from the official 2025-26 normative pathway, and anonymous elective-credit placements are not assigned to individual catalog courses. University Common Core, English and Legal Education requirements are outside this Programme-local coded list, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
